name: list_deploys
description: List all deploys for a specific Render service. Returns deploy IDs, statuses (created, build_in_progress, update_in_progress, live, deactivated, build_failed, update_failed, canceled, pre_deploy_in_progress, pre_deploy_failed), commit information, timestamps, and trigger source.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: The service ID to list deploys for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of deploys to return. Default is 20.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Use the cursor from the previous response to get the next page.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Only return deploys created after this time.

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Only return deploys created before this time.

commit.message: fix: resolve connection pool exhaustion under load
